default.text: Designed and deployed a multi-agent AI operating system orchestrating specialized agents across research, content development, knowledge curation, and deployment — coordinated through Discord, Obsidian, and Codex with rule-bound delegation and project memory.

Authored and directed 5 AI-native videos across multiple generation styles (live-action, anime, stop-motion) in under 4 weeks, integrating Runway, Higgsfield, Seedance 2.0, Midjourney, and ElevenLabs into a repeatable shot-development process spanning workflow, video, image, and audio; launched ai.drsfilms.com as a live portfolio of AI-native creative output.

Architected an automated content distribution layer for YouTube, Bilibili, LinkedIn, and RedNote — single asset, platform-specific tone and packaging, designed to reduce manual overhead in cross-platform creative releases.

Apply 15+ years of film and commercial production craft as the foundation for AI-native creative work — production logic, project evaluation frameworks, and quality judgment that AI tooling alone does not provide. Traditional portfolio archived at drsfilms.com.
